• Feb 19, 2025 · HydratedDocument : A Mongoose type that indicates that the document returned after a database operation will be fully hydrated with Mongoose- ...

- **CLI Commands**:
  - `yarn add @nestjs/mongoose mongoose`
  
- **Latest Versions**:
  - NestJS: v10.x
  - Mongoose: v7.x
  
- **Key Config Options**:
  - Import `MongooseModule` in `AppModule`.
  - Use `@Schema` decorator for defining document schemas.
  - Utilize `@Prop` to define properties within a schema.
  - Employ `HydratedDocument` for type-safe documents.

search:nestjs+mongodb:nestjs mongoose fi.content:
- **Latest Mongoose Version**: v9.6.3
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `npm install mongoose@latest`
- **Key Config Options**:
  - Connection String: `mongoose.connect('mongodb://localhost:27017/mydatabase')`
  - Schema Definition: Define schemas using `new mongoose.Schema({...})`
  - CRUD Operations:
    - Find by ID: `await Model.findById(id)`
    - Update by ID: `await Model.findByIdAndUpdate(id, updateData)`
    - Delete by ID: `await Model.findByIdAndDelete(id)`

qa:mongoose-required-field-modifier.content: ANSWER: required field uses ! (not ?). @Prop({required:true}) title!: string. @Prop() description?: string. RULE: required=! optional=?. NEVER ? for required. NEVER bare field: Type without ! or ?.

NestJS Mongoose required field uses ! or.content: ANSWER: required field uses ! (not ?). @Prop({required:true}) title!: string. @Prop() description?: string. RULE: required=! optional=?. NEVER ? for required. NEVER bare field: Type without ! or ?.

qa:mongoose-prop-mapping.content: @Prop({required:true}) → field!: Type  (exclamation ! means required). @Prop() → field?: Type (question ? means optional). NEVER @Prop({required:true}) field?: string (wrong). NEVER @Prop({required:true}) field: string (wrong, needs !).

NestJS Mongoose schema @Prop required ma.content: @Prop({required:true}) → field!: Type  (exclamation ! means required). @Prop() → field?: Type (question ? means optional). NEVER @Prop({required:true}) field?: string (wrong). NEVER @Prop({required:true}) field: string (wrong, needs !).

qa:mongoose-no-findOneBy.content:
findOneBy does NOT exist in Mongoose. findOneBy is TypeORM-only.
Mongoose CORRECT: findById(id), findByIdAndUpdate(id,{$set:dto},{new:true}), findByIdAndDelete(id)
WRONG: this.model.findOneBy({_id:id})  ← TypeORM only
CORRECT: this.model.findById(id).exec()

NestJS Mongoose service method instead o.content: findOneBy does NOT exist in Mongoose. Mongoose uses findById(id). findOneBy is TypeORM-only. CORRECT: this.model.findById(id).exec(). WRONG: this.model.findOneBy({_id:id}).

qa:mongoose-module-forFeature.content: Use MongooseModule.forFeature NEVER TypeOrmModule in Mongoose projects. @Module({ imports: [MongooseModule.forFeature([{name: Book.name, schema: BookSchema}])] })

NestJS Mongoose module MongooseModule.fo.content: Use MongooseModule.forFeature NEVER TypeOrmModule in Mongoose projects. @Module({ imports: [MongooseModule.forFeature([{name: Book.name, schema: BookSchema}])] })

qa:app-module-mongodb.content:
app.module.ts MongoDB: MongooseModule.forRoot(process.env.MONGODB_URI || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/app')
WRONG: TypeOrmModule with DB_HOST/DB_PORT/DB_NAME  ← PostgreSQL config
MongoDB uses MONGODB_URI, NOT DB_HOST/DB_PORT

NestJS app.module.ts MongoDB database co.content: MongoDB connection: MongooseModule.forRoot(process.env.MONGODB_URI). NEVER TypeOrmModule for MongoDB. NEVER DB_HOST/DB_PORT variables (those are PostgreSQL). MongoDB uses MONGODB_URI.

pattern:nestjs+mongo:required-bang.content: CRITICAL Mongoose TypeScript strict mode: @Prop({required:true}) → field!: Type  (exclamation mark, non-null assertion) @Prop() → field?: Type  (question mark, optional) NEVER: field: Type (without ! or ?)  NEVER use ! for optional fields or ? for required fields.

pattern:nestjs+mongo:no-findOneBy.content: CRITICAL: Mongoose does NOT have findOneBy(). This is TypeORM only. Mongoose methods: findById(id), findOne({field:value}), findByIdAndUpdate(), findByIdAndDelete(). If you see findOneBy in Mongoose code, replace with findById(id).

pattern:nestjs+mongo:correct-module.content: CRITICAL NestJS Mongoose module: imports: [MongooseModule.forFeature([{name: Book.name, schema: BookSchema}])] NEVER: TypeOrmModule.forFeature([Book]) in a Mongoose project. NEVER: MongooseModule.forRoot() in entity module (only in AppModule).

pattern:nestjs+mongodb:schema.content: // schema.ts: @Schema({timestamps:true}) class Book { @Prop({required:true}) title!: string; @Prop() description?: string; } // required→!, optional→?

pattern:nestjs+mongodb:service.content: // service.ts: @InjectModel(Book.name) private model: Model<BookDocument>. findAll(){return this.model.find().exec()} findOne(id){return this.model.findById(id).exec()} create(dto){return new this.model(dto).save()} update(id,dto){return this.model.findByIdAndUpdate(id,{$set:dto},{new:true}).exec()} remove(id){return this.model.findByIdAndDelete(id).exec()}
